app.name: edet
app.connectionFailed: Unable to connect to Holochain. Please check that the conductor is running.

editWallet.acceptanceRuleHelperText: Range inside of which manual moderation of disadvantageous transactions is required. Outside such range toward safe transactions, the acceptance is automatic. On the other side, toward unsafe transactions, refusal is automatic.
editWallet.validationErrorThresholdsEqual: The accept threshold must be lower than the reject threshold. A collapsed range would automatically reject all transactions.

walletDetail.debt_tooltip: Total balance of your active debt contracts. High debt reduces your remaining capacity and system vitality.
walletDetail.reputation_tooltip: Your global EigenTrust score calculated from your transaction history and witness evidence from peers.
walletDetail.vitality_tooltip: Safety margin between your current debt and total capacity. Dropping to 0% prevents new purchases.
walletDetail.trial_activity_tooltip: Track of trial transactions used to build initial trust with strangers. Subject to per-peer and per-epoch limits.
walletDetail.capacity_tooltip: Maximum debt you can carry, derived from your reputation and vouches received from sponsors.
walletDetail.slashed_tooltip: Loss of capacity due to defaults of agents you vouched for, or capacity you've locked to vouch for others.
walletDetail.community_standing_tooltip: Aggregate reliability of your local network neighborhood. Indicates the witness-based failure rate of your peers.
walletDetail.risk_score_tooltip: Probability of default based on path analysis between parties. High risk values trigger manual moderation or auto-rejection.
walletDetail.trust_evidence_tooltip: Hard data from your published ReputationClaims, showing volume transferred and number of unique counter-parties.
walletDetail.next_expiration_tooltip: The earliest upcoming deadline for debt repayment. Failure to repay before this date is recorded as a default, reducing your reputation and triggering slashing for any sponsors who vouched for the capacity.
walletDetail.errorFetchMetrics: Some wallet metrics could not be loaded

supportBreakdown.errorFetchSupportBreakdown: Error fetching the support breakdown for owner: {name} {message}
supportBreakdown.selfSupportHint: You support yourself with the remaining {percent}%

editSupportBreakdown.supportBreakdownHelperText: Specify the peers you want to support. When you sell goods or services, the buyer's debt is distributed across them according to the given proportions. This reduces the supporter's own pending debt load; beneficiaries can decline drain requests, in which case the unresolved amount becomes new genesis debt on the buyer.
editSupportBreakdown.errorCannotDeleteOwner: Cannot remove your own address from the support breakdown

mySupporters.helperText: These are the peers that have listed you as a beneficiary in their support breakdown. When they sell goods or services, part of the debt transfer is directed toward reducing your own outstanding debt.
mySupporters.none: There are no peers supporting you yet.
mySupporters.errorFetchSupportBreakdown: Error fetching the support breakdown for address: {name} {message}

myVouchesGiven.title: Vouches Given
myVouchesGiven.helperText: These are the vouches you have extended as a sponsor. Each active vouch locks part of your credit capacity as collateral. If your vouchee defaults on a contract, a multiple of the defaulted amount may be deducted from your stake (up to the vouch amount). You can release an active vouch only if the vouchee has no outstanding debt contracts.
myVouchesGiven.none: You have not given any vouches yet.
myVouchesGiven.addVouchHelperText: Enter the address of the agent you want to vouch for and set the capacity amount to stake. The staked amount is locked and may be partially deducted if the vouchee defaults. Releasing the vouch requires the vouchee to have no active debt contracts.
myVouchesGiven.noCapacityAvailable: No unlocked capacity available to stake. Release an existing vouch or reduce your debt first.

myVouchesReceived.title: Vouches Received
myVouchesReceived.helperText: These are the vouches your sponsors have extended to you. Each active vouch contributes to your staked capacity. Only the sponsor can release a vouch.
myVouchesReceived.none: You have not received any vouches yet.

myTransactions.warningNoWalletInfo: In order to engage in transactions, you need to associate a Wallet to your address. You can do it from My Wallet in order to start using edet right away.
myTransactions.pendingHelperText: Transactions that require your manual approval or rejection based on your wallet's risk thresholds.
myTransactions.finalizedHelperText: Completed transactions that have been accepted, rejected, or canceled.
myTransactions.nonePending: Transactions requiring manual moderation are displayed here.
myTransactions.noneFinalized: No transaction you have engaged into is finalized yet.
myTransactions.errorFetchTransactions: Error fetching the list of your transactions: {name} {message}

myContracts.activeHelperText: Debt you currently owe. Each contract must be transferred before its deadline by selling goods or services to a new buyer.
myContracts.noActive: No active debt obligations. All clear!
myContracts.settledHelperText: Debt you successfully transferred by selling goods or services. These contribute positively to your trust score.
myContracts.expiredHelperText: Debt that reached maturity without being transferred. Each default reduces your trust score and triggers slashing for your sponsors.
myContracts.archivedHelperText: Settled or expired contracts older than 30 epochs, moved to cold storage to keep active queries fast.

createTransaction.createTransactionHelperText: Fill in the information of the product or service to buy. If available and supported by your device, scan the related QR code for a quicker setup. After reviewing the transaction information, press Buy button to submit the request to the seller.
createTransaction.validationErrorAddressFormat: Please enter a valid holochain address
createTransaction.validationErrorAddressOwn: Own address is not eligible as seller
createTransaction.validationErrorDebtFormat: Debt must be expressed as a positive decimal number
createTransaction.validationErrorAddressHasNoWallet: No Wallet associated to the address specified
createTransaction.warningModerationTitle: The transaction will require manual review from the seller
createTransaction.warningModerationInfo: The transaction's risk score falls in the moderation band — the seller will review it manually before accepting or rejecting.
createTransaction.errorDisadvantageTitle: The transaction will be automatically rejected
createTransaction.errorDisadvantageInfo: The transaction's risk score is above the seller's auto-reject threshold. This may be due to insufficient available capacity, limited transaction history, or the seller's trial-approval limit for this epoch being reached.
createTransaction.trialTransactionInfo: This transaction is within the trial threshold. It will be created as Pending and must be approved by the seller. Subject to the per-(buyer, seller) open-trial gate: only one active trial per pair at a time, released only on full repayment.
createTransaction.sellerNoWallet: This seller has not yet published a wallet.

transactionDetail.confirmAcceptance: Confirm Acceptance? This cannot be undone.
transactionDetail.confirmRejection: Confirm Rejection? This cannot be undone.
transactionDetail.confirmCancellation: Confirm Cancellation? This cannot be undone.
transactionDetail.drainSupporter: Draining your debt on behalf of {supporter}
transactionDetail.buyerNoWallet: This buyer has not yet published a wallet.
